titles.title: Let the Weight of Your Glory Fall Upon us

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v4 v5 v4 v5 v6 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Spirit of the sovereign Lord Come and make Your presence known Reveal the glory of the Living God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the weight of Your glory cover us Let the life of Your river flow Let the truth of Your Kingdom reign in us Let the weight of Your glory Let the weight of Your glory fall,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let the weight of Your glory cover us Let the Life of Your River flow Let the Truth of Your Kingdom reign in us Let the weight of Your glory fall

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I enter the Holy of Holies I enter through the blood of the Lamb I enter to worship You only I enter to honor I AM

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord I worship you, I worship you Lord I worship you, I worship you (For Your Name is Holy, Holy, LORD 2x)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: For Your Name is holy, holy Lord! For Your Name is holy, holy Lord! For Your Name is holy, holy Lord! For Your Name is holy, holy Lord!
